💌 a letter from the heart

Before you read this...

There's a letter inside. Are you brave enough to open it?

"Dear Sumaiya Akka , you are not just my sister — you are my safe place, my loudest cheerleader, and the person who always knows what's good for me even before I do. Happy Birthday, my heart. 🌸"


— with all my love

👭 us, always

Two sisters, one soul

"My person, always 💛"

"Having a sister is like having a best friend you can't get rid of. You know whatever you do, they'll still be there."

— Amy Li

"A sister is someone who loves you from the heart. No matter how much you argue, you cannot be drawn apart."

— Raeanne

You were always there — in my best days and my worst. You never judged me. You never left. That's not just a sister, that's a gift from God.

🎓 the teacher who changed lives

She didn't just teach. She transformed.

> |

"A teacher takes a hand, opens a mind, and touches a heart."

"The best teachers teach from the heart, not from the book."

"What the teacher is, is more important than what she teaches."

"She understood what every student needed — not just knowledge, but kindness."

🎂 the best birthday moment

Warning: this photo will make you smile 😂

Somewhere between the cake and the chaos, the best memories are made...

When the cake wins 😂💛

This smile though... pure happiness! 🎉

🎂

Happy Birthday,
Sumaiya Princess ! 🌸

You are genuinely one of the most caring, most selfless, most beautiful souls I know. You always thought of what's good for me before yourself. You were my sister, my friend, my teacher, my mom — all in one. May this birthday be as wonderful as you make every day feel for the people around you. I love you endlessly. 💛

— With all my love, always 🌹
